follow_on_multiseed_summary.interpretation: Follow-on multiseed/cross-suite deployment strengthens the attempted-failure reduction claim but shows utility gain remains fragile.

oracle_abstain_upper_bound.source: diagnostic upper bound; abstains on actual direct failures first and is not deployable
